qualification.details: Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker: Graduate degree in any discipline. Two or more years of experience in field experiments, crossing work, and data recording in germplasm collections. Basic knowledge of computer (MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.) is desirable.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NBPGR Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview, and the interview date is 30 July 2026. Candidates should report on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker post?
faq.answer: A Graduate degree in any discipline is the minimum educational qualification required for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 18,000/- plus 18% House Rent Allowance (HRA) per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NBPGR Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker position?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Eligible candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in-Interview. Candidates will be assessed based on their qualifications and performance during the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at ICAR-NBPGR, Regional Station, Thrissur, Kerala, with the pincode 680656.

faq.question: Q10. What experience is desirable for the Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker post?
faq.answer: Desirable experience includes working in field experiments, crossing work, and data recording in germplasm collections, along with basic computer knowledge.
